## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or enhancement

## Checks

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I checked that no private or sensitive data is included
- [ ] I have permission to publish any added images or media
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
